Frontend: All 4 tabs working (Vue d'ensemble, Caisse, Agents, Réconciliation). Cash register open/close, agent transactions, and reconciliation report generation all functional.

RBAC permissions correctly implemented - Agents and Reconciliation tabs only visible to ADMIN roles
Cash register prevents duplicate opens on same day
Variance calculation working correctly on register close
